Package com.mps.deepviolet.persist

Class ScanSnapshot

java.lang.Object
com.mps.deepviolet.persist.ScanSnapshot
public class ScanSnapshot extends Object
Top-level persistence snapshot containing all scan results.
Author:
Milton Smith
